title: Portfolio
description: This project is a personal portfolio website designed to showcase my work, skills, and experiences. It serves as a digital resume and a demonstration of my abilities in web development, with a focus on creating a clean, professional, and interactive user experience.

title: Laptop Price Prediction
description: LaptopPricePredictor_UI is an intuitive and user-friendly web application designed to predict laptop prices based on various input features. This project aims to provide users with an easy-to-use interface for estimating the cost of laptops using machine learning algorithms and historical data.

title: Laptop Price Prediction-server
description: The Laptop Price Prediction Server is a Flask-based web application designed to provide laptop price predictions and brand-specific pricing insights. It leverages machine learning to estimate laptop prices based on user-specified configurations and delivers data for analysis and visualization.

title: Bill Buddy
description: The Billbuddy App is a comprehensive financial management application designed to simplify expense tracking and bill splitting among groups. It leverages Flutter for a responsive and intuitive frontend, Node.js for robust backend services, and MySQL for reliable data storage.

title: Online Bookstore
description: The Online Bookstore MySQL Database is designed to support a comprehensive online bookstore application. This database structure enables efficient storage, retrieval, and management of data related to books, authors, customers, and transactions.

title: Real-Time Traffic Recognition and Classification System
description: The Real-Time Traffic Recognition and Classification system leverages advanced deep learning techniques to monitor and analyze traffic conditions using YOLO and other classification models. This system provides real-time detection and classification of various traffic elements, such as vehicles, traffic signs, and signals, contributing to smarter traffic management and enhanced road safety.
